name: Ubiquiti Power Adapter POE-24-12W
title: Ubiquiti Power Adapter POE-24-12W
title_extended: Ubiquiti Power Adapter POE-24-12W - 24V DC, 12W, 0.5A, 100 Mbps, 2-Pair PoE

detailed_description.heading: Purpose-Built PoE Adapter for Network Devices
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti POE-24-12W is a purpose-built Power over Ethernet (PoE) adapter, designed to supply both power and data through a single Ethernet cable, simplifying the deployment of network devices. This model is part of Ubiquiti's broader strategy to provide efficient and reliable power solutions tailored to specific networking hardware needs. The POE-24-12W outputs 24V DC at 0.5A, translating to a total power output of 12 watts. This power level is ideally suited for powering Ubiquiti devices such as smaller UniFi access points, airMAX stations, and other network equipment that are compatible with 24V passive PoE. The adapter is designed to operate with high efficiency, minimizing power loss and maximizing the energy delivered directly to the connected devices.

detailed_description.heading: Key Features
detailed_description.text: Features: Surge protection Clamping protection Maximum surge discharge Peak pulse current AC cable with earth ground

detailed_description.heading: Safety and Compliance
detailed_description.text: The POE-24-12W includes essential safety features such as surge protection, which shields both the adapter and the connected devices from voltage spikes. Additionally, overcurrent protection is incorporated to prevent damage from excessive current, enhancing the longevity of both the PoE adapter and the powered devices. This adapter is compliant with major international standards, holding CE, FCC, and IC certifications. These certifications are indicative of the adapter’s adherence to safety, health, and environmental protection standards, making it suitable for use in a wide range of residential and commercial settings.
